description.p: TuxFlow lets developers manage their entire dev environment from one window — start/stop/restart dev servers, run multiple AI coding agents side by side, monitor process status and resource usage, auto-restart crashed processes, watch files for changes, and expose an MCP server so AI agents can observe and control neighboring processes.

ul.li: Manage multiple dev processes (servers, watchers, queues) from a single window
Run AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) side by side
Auto-detect project stacks (Node.js, Rust, Python, Go, PHP, Ruby, Docker)
Auto-restart crashed processes with exponential backoff
File watching with glob patterns to restart on changes
MCP server for AI agent integration
